titleStmt.title: SII 38.99: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 99. (A.R. No. 99 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājarāja (III) Year 27th; Dhanus, ba. di. 2, Wednesday puṉar pūśam = 10 December 1242 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 32 cows, one bull and one lamp (añjunilaikuttu-viḷakku) by Nalluḻāṇ Sīgurukūrāḻvāṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ, a native of Ānāṅkūr in Paṉiūrnāḍu in Irāśarāśa-vaḷanāḍu, in Koṉṟūr Villippākkam alias Naḍuvu-nāḍu, in Ambattūrnāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Vikkiramaśoḻa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. Two persons Pādirikōṉ Avaiyampukkāṉ and Tirukkāḷattikkōyil koṇḍāṉ received the gift and agreed to measure out 45 nāḻi each (total 90 nāḻi) per year to burn the perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājateva
ṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7vatu taṉunāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu dvi
tiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ ja
yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa
vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ampattūrnāṭṭuk koṉ
ṟūr villipākkattu naṭuvunāṭāṉa Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭup pa
ṉaiūr nāṭṭu Ānāṅkūrnalluḻāṉ cikuru kūrāḻvāṉ tiruve
kampamuṭaiyāṉeṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉār
kkuc candrādityavarai celvatāka vaitta tirunaṉtāviḷakku O
ṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu 3 10 2 ṛṣabham 1 Añcu nilaikkuttuviḷakku O
ṉṟu Ippacu muppattiraṇṭum ṛṣabham Oṉṟum cāvāmuvā
p perumāṭākak kaikkoṇṭāṉ pātirikkoṉ Avai
yam pukkāṉ viḷakku Araikku Aḷakkum ney nāṟpattai
ñ ñāḻiyum tirukkāḷattikkoyilkoṇṭāṉ viḷakku A
raikku Aḷakku ney nāṟpattaiññāḻiyum Āka Āṇṭo
ṉṟukku Aḷakkum ney toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum Ippaṭi ca
ndrādityavarai celuttakkaṭavom Ivviruvom Itu pam
māheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 38.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
